latin: Post multos annos itineris, Marcus Polus tandem Sinas attigit. Palatium Magni Khan tam magnificum erat ut verba ei deessent. 'nemo in Europa haec credere poterit,' amico suo dixit.

questions.prompt: How long did Marco Polo's journey take?
How did Marco Polo react to the Khan's palace?
questions.target: He was speechless at its magnificence
choices: He was speechless at its magnificence

translation: After many years of traveling, Marco Polo finally reached China. The palace of the Great Khan was so magnificent that words failed him. 'No one in Europe will believe this,' he told his companion.
